headline: Sports Physical Therapist (DPT, SCS) at Iron City Sports Medicine | Volunteer Head Track Coach, Crestwood High
summary: Sports Physical Therapist at Iron City Sports Medicine in Homewood, Alabama, specializing in return-to-sport rehabilitation for athletes. Doctor of Physical Therapy from Samford University (2019), with a BS in Exercise Science from the University of Alabama at Birmingham (2016). Board-certified Sports Clinical Specialist (SCS). Volunteer head track and field coach at Crestwood High School. Based in Birmingham, AL.
